title: TikTok Video Script Creator
promptText: Write a TikTok video script about [VIDEO_TOPIC] for my [NICHE] account. The target audience is [AUDIENCE]. The video format should be [VIDEO_FORMAT]. Create a complete script with these elements: Hook (first 1-3 seconds) — the opening line or visual that stops the scroll. This is the most critical part. Give me 3 hook options ranked by predicted retention. Body (15-45 seconds) — the main content delivered in short, punchy sentences. Each line should be one breath or less. Include visual/action cues in brackets for what should appear on screen. Pacing notes — mark where to speed up, slow down, or pause for effect. Call to action (final 3-5 seconds) — drive a specific action: follow, comment, save, or share. Each CTA should give a reason to act. Also provide: a text overlay strategy (what words appear on screen and when), 3 sound or music suggestions that match the energy, 5 caption options under 150 characters with relevant hashtags, and a suggested posting time based on the audience. Total video length should be [VIDEO_LENGTH] seconds. Write for vertical video. Every second counts — cut anything that doesn't earn its screen time.
description: This prompt creates TikTok scripts engineered for the platform's unique attention dynamics, where the first second determines whether someone watches or scrolls. The three-hook approach gives you options to test the most effective opener, while the breath-length sentence structure ensures natural delivery on camera. Visual cues and text overlay strategies are included because TikTok is a visual-first platform where 40% of viewers watch without sound. The pacing notes help creators who tend to speak monotonously on camera vary their energy. Whether you are building a personal brand, promoting a product, or growing an educational account, this prompt adapts to any niche while following the patterns that drive viral reach.

variables.name: VIDEO_TOPIC
variables.example: 3 AI tools that replace a $5,000/month marketing team

variables.name: NICHE
variables.example: AI tools and automation for small business owners

variables.name: AUDIENCE
variables.example: entrepreneurs and solopreneurs aged 25-40 who want to save time and money

variables.name: VIDEO_FORMAT
variables.example: talking head with text overlays and screen recordings

tips: Film 3 versions with different hooks and post the one where your watch-through rate is highest
Mention trending sounds or formats you have seen performing well so ChatGPT can adapt the script
Ask for a 'stitch-bait' version that other creators will want to react to for organic reach
exampleOutput:
## HOOK OPTIONS (pick one)
1. [Look directly at camera] "Stop paying $5K a month for marketing." (Confrontational — highest predicted retention)
2. [Point at text overlay] "These 3 AI tools replaced my entire marketing team." (Proof-based)
3. [Shake head] "I can't believe this is free." (Curiosity gap)

## BODY (30 seconds)
[Cut to screen recording]
"Tool number one — [SLOW DOWN] and this one's a game changer for content."

[Text overlay: "1. CASTMAGIC"]
"You paste in one podcast episode... [snap] ...it gives you a blog post, social captions, an email newsletter, AND a quote graphic."

[Quick cut — new angle]
"That used to take my VA six hours. Now it takes forty-five seconds."

[Text overlay: "2. INSTANTLY"]
"Cold email that doesn't feel cold..."

## CTA
[Direct to camera, lean in]
"Follow for more tools that save you thousands. I post three every week."

## CAPTION OPTIONS
1. "My marketing team is three AI tools and a laptop" #aitools #marketing
2. "$5K/month → $0/month. Same results." #entrepreneur #automation
metaTitle: TikTok Video Script Creator Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Create viral TikTok scripts with hooks, pacing notes, and text overlays using ChatGPT. Optimized for short-form video.
